key.name: key-size
key.description: Sets the padding around key labels in the heatmap widget.

key.name: heatmap-begin-color
key.description: The starting color for the heatmap gradient (lowest frequency).

key.name: heatmap-end-color
key.description: The ending color for the heatmap gradient (highest frequency).

key.name: heatmap-single-color
key.description: The color used in single color mode.

key.name: use-single-color-heatmap
key.description: If enabled, only the 'begin' color is used to generate a monochromatic gradient.

key.name: reverse-heatmap-gradient
key.description: If enabled, the gradient direction is reversed (dark-to-light instead of light-to-dark).

key.name: use-accent-color
key.description: If enabled, the system accent color will be used as the base color for the heatmap.
